summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: ValueTracker A_tr morphs triangle ABC through 5 configs (scalene, right, obtuse, near-equilateral, scalene). always_redraw rebuilds BLUE outer triangle + 6 GREY trisector rays + GREEN inner Morley triangle at adjacent-trisector intersections. Live |s1|,|s2|,|s3| DecimalNumbers stay equal within ~1e-3 confirming inner triangle equilateral.
